page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package for innovative Bayesian adaptive commensurate designs that borrows adaptively from historical information and also uses a payoff function to optimize the timing of the study’s interim analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package for innovative Bayesian adaptive commensurate designs that borrows adaptively from historical information and also uses a payoff function to optimize the timing of the study’s interim analysis.
